# Exevo Pan

Exevo Pan is a Tibia website focused on helping players make better Bazaar and boss-hunting decisions.
Its two most important use cases are:

1) finding the best Tibia characters on sale in the official Char Bazaar
2) tracking Tibia bosses by world, spawn chance, and recent appearances

## Core Value

Exevo Pan helps users quickly discover high-value Char Bazaar opportunities. It provides strong search, filtering, and analytics so players can find characters that match their goals, budget, and playstyle.

Exevo Pan also helps users track down Tibia bosses. Players can monitor boss spawn chances per server, review recently appeared bosses, and organize checks with hunting groups.

## Main Features

- Char Bazaar search for current auctions and Bazaar history
- Advanced Bazaar filters (vocation, world/location, items, imbuements, charms, quests, achievements, and more)
- Auction-focused tools such as favorites, auction notifications, and "find similar" flows
- Tibia boss tracker with per-server data, spawn timing signals, and chance-based ordering
- Recently appeared bosses timeline for quick routing and decision-making
- Hunting Groups tools for cooperative boss checks, notifications, logs, and group activity tracking
- Bazaar statistics and highscores (volume, revenue, success rate, top bids, top levels, top skills)
- Tibia calculators (auction estimation, exercise weapons, stamina, charm damage, imbuements cost, loot split)
- Blog content with Tibia guides, tutorials, tips, and updates

## Emphasis: Char Bazaar Character Discovery

Exevo Pan is built to help users find the best Tibia characters on sale at the Bazaar.
Users can filter large numbers of auctions, compare results, inspect character details, and identify strong value opportunities faster than browsing manually.
The platform includes current auctions, historical auction data, rankings, and price-related tools to improve buying and selling decisions.

## Emphasis: Boss Tracking

Exevo Pan is also built to help users track down Tibia bosses efficiently.
The boss tracker organizes information by game server, highlights expected chances, and shows recently seen bosses to guide hunting priorities.
For group play, hunting group features support collaboration, check logs, member coordination, and boss notifications.

## Exevo Pro (Premium Layer)

Exevo Pro extends both primary pillars (Bazaar + Bosses), including premium filters and deeper insights.
Examples include:

- access to all bosses in the tracker
- Tibia Coins invested analysis for Bazaar characters
- premium auction filters and advanced tracking utilities
- auction bid notifications and highlight discounts
- private hunting groups

## Audience

Tibia players who buy/sell characters on Char Bazaar, track bosses for profit/progression, and optimize decisions using data-driven tools.

## Language Support

The website is localized in multiple languages, including English, Portuguese, Spanish, and Polish.
